creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I upgraded sysutils/duplicity to 0.5.06 which was released yesterday. 

Some notes: 
* I didn't see the need to add the gettext dependency. Gettext is already in 
the dependencies and duplicity is not using it directly (i.e. linking with 
libintl) but is using it via the python bindings. 
* share/locale in the pkg-plist is ok, you can prefix it with %%NLS%% if 
the port installs those files conditionally. %%NLS%% is replaced either 
with an empty string "" or with "@comment ". 
* 3 more files had to be added to the pkg-plist, see 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/sysutils/duplicity/pkg-plist.diff?r1=1.6;r2=1.7 

Thank you!
